name: refactor-skill
description: Modernization and re-architecture for Claude Code. endpoint-rearchitect: language-agnostic endpoint re-architecture (trace /search end-to-end across Java/Kotlin, JS/TS, Python, Go, C#, Ruby, PHP; pin behavior with characterization tests; restructure without changing business logic). java-modernization: Java 8/11/17 to 21, Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x, javax-to-jakarta, dependency alignment, with a searchable knowledge base.
